summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a standout Dark Star performance, with noticeable improvement over previous releases.
review: The recording is praised for its clear, improved sound quality compared to earlier versions of this show, indicating a solid soundboard source. Musically the highlight for reviewers is the Dark Star, which many cite as exceptional despite some criticism of vocal delivery and overall stylistic direction.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical focus on a celebrated Dark Star and positive comments on the sound quality outweigh the few negative remarks about vocals and style.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note a noticeable improvement over previous releases, describing the audio as clearer and better balanced; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Limited detail on set structure; the consensus centers on Dark Star as the key moment of the performance.
